# Distinct binaries per host (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. Distinct binaries per host. `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`).

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and actor_process_image_name != null | comp count_distinct(actor_process_image_name) as distinct_bins by agent_hostname | sort desc distinct_bins | limit 25
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
